title: Dream Relics
description: Dream Relics is a mod that adds unique accessories and items to Minecraft.
body:
##  Overview
Dream Relics is a mod that adds unique accessories and items to Minecraft through Curios API integration. The mod focuses on providing players with diverse equipment choices and strategic combinations, with each item carrying special abilities and thematic significance.
Core Item System
Main Accessory Categories:
Necklaces: Astral Necklace, Void Necklace, Memory Necklace, Heart Voice Pendant
Rings: Tassel Ring, Mist Veil Ring, Dark Whisper Ring, Past Ring
Bracelets: Awaken Dream Bracelet, Rare Gold Bracelet
Special Accessories: Observe Self Eye, Echo Earring, Sleeping Star Seed, Dream Totem
Functional Items:
Soul Mirror: Return to death point or respawn point
Liminal Key: Transfer enchantments between items
Memory Stardust: Store multiple accessories and activate them simultaneously
Flawless Gem: Repair item durability and remove negative enchantments
Moment Stone: Accelerate block time flow
Key Mechanics

Buffs: Pure Holy Grail increases experience gain, Elven Boots provides multiple jumps
Strategic: Tassel Ring increases damage based on target's health percentage, Dream Balance equalizes experience requirements per level
Technical Features
Complete Forge event system integration
Custom capabilities system
Deep integration with vanilla Minecraft systems
Server environment support
Balance Design
The mod emphasizes game balance, with most powerful effects having corresponding costs or limitations:
Nightmare Book increases damage taken and doubles negative effect duration
Icarus Wings reduces air resistance but carries fall risk
Royal Lens increases critical damage but requires precise timing
Target Audience
Players who enjoy collecting and combining different equipment sets
Players seeking new combat strategies and gameplay experiences
Players interested in fantasy themes and mysterious items
Acquisition
All items are available in creative mode, suitable as rewards or special event drops in survival servers.
